title: じいちゃん子たちの集い

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While strolling through the shopping district, I
spot Yaeno Muteki and Seiun Sky in a souvenir
shop.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... What kind of souvenir should I get for
Grampa?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Picking out a gift for your gramps, Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh, Seiun Sky, it's you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I plan to visit Gram—my grandfather on my next
day off, and I wish to take him a souvenir.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, were you about to say "Grampa" just
now?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No, you must have misheard me! I would never
refer to my grandfather with such an overly
familiar moniker.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I guess I did mishear you. My mistake.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Still, you seem to be thinking awfully hard about
this.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It may only be a simple souvenir, but my
grandfather will be able to tell immediately
whether I've put much thought into its selection.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I must do my utmost to avoid being discourteous.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That sounds real tough. My gramps is happy with
whatever I give him.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It certainly is a laborious task.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But the more effort I put into the search, the
more satisfying it is to see his delighted reaction.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I see what you're saying. Then I think I'll
pick something out, too.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking I should pay Gramps a visit the
next time I'm back home.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's heartening to have someone searching
alongside me. Please let me know if you come
across anything suitable.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Now, what to choose...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I know I said my gramps likes whatever I give him,
but I would really love to blow his socks off this
time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch the two Umamusume peruse souvenirs,
my gaze meets Seiun Sky's.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hold on now, were you listening to all that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But man, picking out a gift is a lot tougher when
you actually have to think about it.
choice_data_list:
You must both love your grandfathers very
much.

You'll be fine if you put your heart into your
choice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I suppose you could say that... He does a lot for
me, and has done so since I was very young. I
hold great respect for him.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I always make time to give him a shoulder
massage whenever I return home.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you give him some "free massage
tickets"?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! I had not considered making something
myself. He might like that.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I wonder... I hope that he would, at least...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You say some good things, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So all we gotta do is pick something out while
thinking, "Like it, Gramps! Like it, Gramps!"
Right?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I see... I'll give it a try then. Like it, Grampa! Like
it, Gra...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, so you do call him "Grampa."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I, I was merely doing as you said!
